name: punched-route-navigability
description: Drive five high-power free-aim punches through the shared wall, verify a continuous 8x8-stud route, bounded falloff, punchable rubble, protected sides, and a complete world reset.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke('Reset') c:Invoke('SetStats',{DailyQuestDate=os.date('!%Y-%m-%d')}) c:Invoke('SetStats',{Power=1e12,WallLevel=99,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local blocks=root['Depth Blocks'] local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local r=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart r.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(-2,3,-20),Vector3.new(-2,3,-400)) local results={} local beforeLast=0 for i=1,5 do if i==5 then beforeLast=workspace:GetServerTimeNow() end local x=c:Invoke('PunchRadius') table.insert(results,{ok=x.ok,broken=x.brokenCount,hit=x.hitCount,travel=x.lungeDistance,z=r.Position.Z,corrected=x.collisionCorrected}) r.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(r.Position,r.Position+Vector3.new(0,0,-10)) end local reachedZ=r.Position.Z local firstScale,lastScale,firstForward,lastForward=0,0,0,0 local maxIndex=0 for _,b in ipairs(blocks:GetChildren()) do if (b:GetAttribute('LastRadiusHitAt') or 0)>=beforeLast then local index=b:GetAttribute('LastPenetrationIndex') or 0 if index==1 then firstScale=b:GetAttribute('LastRadiusDamageScale') or 0 firstForward=b:GetAttribute('LastPenetrationForward') or 0 end if index>maxIndex then maxIndex=index lastScale=b:GetAttribute('LastRadiusDamageScale') or 0 lastForward=b:GetAttribute('LastPenetrationForward') or 0 end end end task.wait(2.5) local complete,missing=0,0 for layer=1,75 do local opened=0 for _,row in ipairs({1,2}) do for _,col in ipairs({6,7}) do local b=blocks:FindFirstChild(string.format('DepthBlock_L%03d_C%02d_R%02d',layer,col,row)) if not b then missing+=1 elseif b:GetAttribute('Broken') or b:GetAttribute('StructuralDetached') then opened+=1 end end end if opened==4 and layer==complete+1 then complete=layer end end local sideBroken=0 for layer=1,75 do for _,col in ipairs({1,12}) do for row=1,6 do local b=blocks:FindFirstChild(string.format('DepthBlock_L%03d_C%02d_R%02d',layer,col,row)) if b and (b:GetAttribute('Broken') or b:GetAttribute('StructuralDetached')) then sideBroken+=1 end end end end local rubble,routeRubble,badRubble=0,0,0 for _,b in ipairs(blocks:GetChildren()) do if b:GetAttribute('StructuralDetached') then rubble+=1 if math.abs(b.Position.X+2)<3.7 and b.Position.Y<6.5 and b.Position.Z<-35 and b.Position.Z>reachedZ-6 then routeRubble+=1 local anchoredWithoutSettled=b.Anchored and not b:GetAttribute('StructuralSettled') if b:GetAttribute('Broken') or (b:GetAttribute('HP') or 0)<=0 or not b.CanCollide or not b.CanQuery or anchoredWithoutSettled then badRubble+=1 end end end end local blockHighlights,decorativeHighlights=0,0 for _,d in ipairs(root:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA('Highlight') or d:IsA('SelectionBox') then local adornee=d.Adornee local targetsBlock=d:IsDescendantOf(blocks) or (adornee and (adornee:IsDescendantOf(blocks) or adornee:GetAttribute('IsDepthBlock'))) if targetsBlock then blockHighlights+=1 else decorativeHighlights+=1 end end end local beforeReset=#blocks:GetChildren() local reset=c:Invoke('ResetWorld') local restored=0 for _,b in ipairs(blocks:GetChildren()) do if not b:GetAttribute('Broken') and not b:GetAttribute('StructuralDetached') and b.Anchored and b.CanCollide and b.CanQuery and b.Transparency==0 then restored+=1 end end local allPunches=true local totalTravel=0 for _,x in ipairs(results) do allPunches=allPunches and x.ok and x.hit>0 and not x.corrected totalTravel+=x.travel end local valid=allPunches and totalTravel>170 and reachedZ<-185 and complete>=40 and sideBroken==0 and missing==0 and beforeReset==5400 and #blocks:GetChildren()==5400 and restored==5400 and reset.ok and badRubble==0 and firstScale>=lastScale and firstForward<=lastForward and maxIndex>=40 and root:GetAttribute('PunchTargetMode')=='BodyDirectionFreeAim' and blockHighlights==0 return H:JSONEncode({allPunches=allPunches,totalTravel=totalTravel,reachedZ=reachedZ,complete=complete,openingWidth=8,openingHeight=8,sideBroken=sideBroken,missing=missing,rubble=rubble,routeRubble=routeRubble,badRubble=badRubble,firstScale=firstScale,lastScale=lastScale,firstForward=firstForward,lastForward=lastForward,maxIndex=maxIndex,targetMode=root:GetAttribute('PunchTargetMode'),blockHighlights=blockHighlights,decorativeHighlights=decorativeHighlights,beforeReset=beforeReset,afterReset=#blocks:GetChildren(),restored=restored,valid=valid})

steps.label: continuous free-aim route and reset are valid
